## Release PR

### Version
- Target version: `vX.Y.Z`
- [ ] `package.xml` version updated
- [ ] `package.xml` date updated (`YYYY-MM-DD`)

### Changelog
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Breaking changes documented (if any)

### Validation
- [ ] Workbench load test passed
- [ ] Core commands/task panels load without runtime/import errors
- [ ] Addon Manager install/update smoke test passed

### Notes
- Related issues:
- Risk and rollback plan:
